name: D&D 5e SRD Core Rules
description: System Reference Document 5.2.1 — released under CC BY 4.0.

conditions.name: Blinded
conditions.body: {"description":"A Blinded creature can't see and auto-fails any ability check that requires sight. Attacks against it have Advantage, and its own attacks have Disadvantage.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","imposedAdvantageOnAttacksAgainst":true,"attacksHaveDisadvantage":true}]}

conditions.name: Charmed
conditions.body: {"description":"A Charmed creature can't attack the charmer or target the charmer with damaging abilities or magical effects. The charmer has Advantage on any ability check to interact socially with the creature."}

conditions.name: Deafened
conditions.body: {"description":"A Deafened creature can't hear and auto-fails any ability check that requires hearing."}

conditions.name: Exhaustion
conditions.body: {"description":"Exhaustion is tracked as a level from 1 to 6. While Exhausted, D20 Tests are reduced by 2 times the level, and Speed is reduced by 5 feet times the level. A creature at Exhaustion level 6 dies. A Long Rest reduces Exhaustion by 1 level. Exhaustion is cumulative: additional sources add to the level."}

conditions.name: Frightened
conditions.body: {"description":"A Frightened creature has Disadvantage on ability checks and attack rolls while the source of its fear is within line of sight. It also can't willingly move closer to the source of its fear.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","attacksHaveDisadvantage":true}]}

conditions.name: Grappled
conditions.body: {"description":"A Grappled creature's Speed is 0 and can't benefit from any bonus to its Speed. The creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls against any target other than the grappler. The condition ends if the grappler is Incapacitated or if the creature is moved outside the grappler's reach.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","speedZero":true,"grappled":true}]}

conditions.name: Incapacitated
conditions.body: {"description":"An Incapacitated creature can't take any action, Bonus Action, or Reaction. Its concentration is broken. It can't speak. If the creature is Surprised, it has Disadvantage on Initiative rolls.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","incapacitated":true,"cannotTakeActions":true,"cannotTakeReactions":true}]}

conditions.name: Invisible
conditions.body: {"description":"While Invisible, a creature is Heavily Obscured for the purpose of being found by sight and is Concealed. Attack rolls against it have Disadvantage, and its own attack rolls have Advantage. The creature has Advantage on Initiative rolls.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","invisibleToSight":true}]}

conditions.name: Paralyzed
conditions.body: {"description":"A Paralyzed creature is Incapacitated, its Speed is 0, and it auto-fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. Attacks against the creature have Advantage, and any attack that hits from within 5 feet is a critical hit.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","incapacitated":true,"speedZero":true,"autoFailSavesOf":["dexterity","strength"],"imposedAdvantageOnAttacksAgainst":true,"cannotTakeActions":true,"cannotTakeReactions":true}]}

conditions.name: Petrified
conditions.body: {"description":"A Petrified creature is transformed, along with any object it's wearing or carrying, into a solid inanimate substance (usually stone). Its weight increases by a factor of 10, and it ceases aging. The creature is Incapacitated, its Speed is 0, and it is unaware of its surroundings. Attacks against it have Advantage. It auto-fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. It has Resistance to all damage and Immunity to the Poisoned condition.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","incapacitated":true,"speedZero":true,"autoFailSavesOf":["dexterity","strength"],"imposedAdvantageOnAttacksAgainst":true,"cannotTakeActions":true,"cannotTakeReactions":true}]}

conditions.name: Poisoned
conditions.body: {"description":"A Poisoned creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls and ability checks.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","attacksHaveDisadvantage":true}]}

conditions.name: Prone
conditions.body: {"description":"A Prone creature's only movement options are to crawl or to spend half its Speed to stand up (ending the condition). The creature has Disadvantage on attack rolls. Attack rolls against the creature have Advantage if the attacker is within 5 feet; otherwise they have Disadvantage.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","attacksHaveDisadvantage":true}]}

conditions.name: Restrained
conditions.body: {"description":"A Restrained creature's Speed is 0 and can't benefit from any bonus to its Speed. Attacks against it have Advantage, and its own attacks have Disadvantage. It has Disadvantage on Dexterity saving throws.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","speedZero":true,"imposedAdvantageOnAttacksAgainst":true,"attacksHaveDisadvantage":true},{"t":"modifySave","ability":"dexterity","advantage":"disadvantage"}]}

conditions.name: Stunned
conditions.body: {"description":"A Stunned creature is Incapacitated, can't move, and can speak only falteringly. It auto-fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. Attacks against it have Advantage.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","incapacitated":true,"speedZero":true,"autoFailSavesOf":["dexterity","strength"],"imposedAdvantageOnAttacksAgainst":true,"cannotTakeActions":true,"cannotTakeReactions":true}]}

conditions.name: Unconscious
conditions.body: {"description":"An Unconscious creature is Incapacitated, can't move or speak, and is unaware of its surroundings. It drops whatever it's holding and falls Prone. Its Speed is 0. Attacks against it have Advantage. It auto-fails Strength and Dexterity saving throws. Any attack that hits from within 5 feet is a critical hit.","effects":[{"t":"conditionInteraction","incapacitated":true,"speedZero":true,"autoFailSavesOf":["dexterity","strength"],"imposedAdvantageOnAttacksAgainst":true,"cannotTakeActions":true,"cannotTakeReactions":true}]}

weaponProperties.name: Ammunition
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["ammunition"],"description":"You can use a weapon that has the Ammunition property to make a ranged attack only if you have ammunition to fire from it. You must draw the ammunition as part of the attack. You can recover half your expended ammunition by taking 1 minute to search the battlefield after combat."}

weaponProperties.name: Finesse
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["finesse"],"description":"When making an attack with a Finesse weapon, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modifier for the attack and damage rolls. You must use the same modifier for both rolls."}

weaponProperties.name: Heavy
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["heavy"],"description":"Small or Tiny creatures have Disadvantage on attack rolls with Heavy weapons. A Heavy weapon's size and bulk make it too large for them to use effectively."}

weaponProperties.name: Light
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["light"],"description":"A Light weapon is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when fighting with two weapons."}

weaponProperties.name: Loading
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["loading"],"description":"You can fire only one piece of ammunition from a Loading weapon when you use an action, Bonus Action, or Reaction to fire it, regardless of the number of attacks you can normally make."}

weaponProperties.name: Range
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["range"],"description":"A Range weapon has a normal and long range in feet. Attack rolls beyond the normal range have Disadvantage, and you can't attack a target beyond the long range."}

weaponProperties.name: Reach
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["reach"],"description":"A Reach weapon adds 5 feet to your reach when you attack with it, as well as when determining your reach for Opportunity Attacks with it."}

weaponProperties.name: Thrown
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["thrown"],"description":"If a weapon has the Thrown property, you can throw it to make a ranged attack. If it is a melee weapon, you use the same ability modifier for the attack and damage rolls that you would use for a melee attack with it. For example, if you throw a Handaxe, you use Strength; if you throw a Dagger, you can use Strength or Dexterity because the weapon also has the Finesse property."}

weaponProperties.name: Two-Handed
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["twoHanded"],"description":"A Two-Handed weapon requires two hands when you attack with it."}

weaponProperties.name: Versatile
weaponProperties.body: {"flags":["versatile"],"description":"A Versatile weapon can be used with one or two hands. A damage value in parentheses appears with the property — the damage when the weapon is used with two hands to make a melee attack."}

weaponMasteries.name: Cleave
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"On a melee hit, you can make one extra attack roll against a different creature within 5 feet of the original target. Damage is the weapon's damage without the ability modifier."}

weaponMasteries.name: Graze
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"On a melee miss, the target takes damage equal to the ability modifier used for the attack roll. Damage is the same type as the weapon's."}

weaponMasteries.name: Nick
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"When you make the extra attack of the Light property with this weapon, you can make it as part of the Attack action instead of as a Bonus Action."}

weaponMasteries.name: Push
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"On a hit, you can push the target up to 10 feet straight away from you if it is Large or smaller."}

weaponMasteries.name: Sap
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"On a hit, the target has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn."}

weaponMasteries.name: Slow
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"On a hit, the target's Speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn. The effect doesn't stack with itself."}

weaponMasteries.name: Topple
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"On a hit, the target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw (DC 8 + your ability modifier + your Proficiency Bonus) or have the Prone condition."}

weaponMasteries.name: Vex
weaponMasteries.body: {"description":"On a hit, you have Advantage on your next attack roll against the target before the end of your next turn."}

spells.name: Acid Splash
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:conjuration","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":60},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"You create an acidic bubble at a point within range, where it explodes in a 5-foot-radius Sphere. Each creature in the Sphere must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 Acid damage.","cantripUpgrade":"The damage increases by 1d6 when you reach levels 5 (2d6), 11 (3d6), and 17 (4d6)."}

spells.name: Dancing Lights
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:illusion","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":120},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a bit of phosphorus or wychwood, or a glowworm"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1,"concentration":true},"targets":["point"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"You create up to four torch-sized lights within range, making each light appear as a torch, a lantern, or a glowing orb that hovers in the air for the duration. You can also combine the four lights into one glowing vaguely humanoid form of Medium size. Whichever form you choose, each light sheds Dim Light in a 10-foot radius. As a Bonus Action, you can move the lights up to 60 feet to a new spot within range."}

spells.name: Druidcraft
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:transmutation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":30},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["point"],"classListIds":["srd:druid"],"description":"You create one of the following effects within range: a tiny, harmless sensory effect that predicts the next 24 hours of weather; a flower to instantly bloom, a seed pod to open, or a leaf bud to bloom; an instantaneous, harmless sensory effect (e.g., falling leaves, puff of wind, sound of an animal); or you light or snuff out a candle, torch, or small campfire."}

spells.name: Eldritch Blast
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:evocation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":120},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:warlock"],"description":"A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 Force damage.","cantripUpgrade":"You create two beams at level 5, three beams at level 11, and four beams at level 17. You can direct the beams at the same target or at different ones. Make a separate attack roll for each beam."}

spells.name: Fire Bolt
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:evocation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":120},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreatureOrObject"],"classListIds":["srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or an object within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 Fire damage. A flammable object hit by this spell starts burning if it isn't being worn or carried.","cantripUpgrade":"The damage increases by 1d10 when you reach levels 5 (2d10), 11 (3d10), and 17 (4d10)."}

spells.name: Guidance
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:divination","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"touch"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1,"concentration":true},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:cleric","srd:druid"],"description":"You touch a willing creature and choose a skill. Until the spell ends, the creature adds 1d4 to any ability check using the chosen skill. The spell then ends."}

spells.name: Light
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:evocation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"touch"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"m","description":"a firefly or phosphorescent moss"}],"duration":{"t":"hours","hours":1},"targets":["oneObject"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:cleric","srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"You touch one object that is no larger than 10 feet in any dimension. Until the spell ends, the object sheds Bright Light in a 20-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 20 feet. The light can be colored as you like. Completely covering the object with something opaque blocks the light. The spell ends if you cast it again or dismiss it (no action required). If you target an object held or worn by a hostile creature, that creature must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw to avoid the spell."}

spells.name: Mage Hand
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:conjuration","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":30},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1},"targets":["point"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:sorcerer","srd:warlock","srd:wizard"],"description":"A spectral, floating hand appears at a point you choose within range. The hand lasts for the duration or until you dismiss it (no action required). The hand vanishes if it is more than 30 feet from you or if you cast this spell again. As a Magic action, you can control the hand to manipulate an object, open an unlocked door or container, stow or retrieve an item from an open container, or pour the contents out of a vial. You can move the hand up to 30 feet each time you use it. The hand can't attack, activate magic items, or carry more than 10 pounds."}

spells.name: Mending
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:transmutation","castingTime":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1},"range":{"t":"touch"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"two lodestones"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneObject"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:cleric","srd:druid","srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"This spell repairs a single break or tear in an object you touch, such as a broken chain link, two halves of a broken key, a torn cloak, or a leaking wineskin. As long as the break or tear is no larger than 1 foot in any dimension, you mend it, leaving no trace of the former damage. This spell can physically repair a magic item or construct, but it can't restore magic to such an object."}

spells.name: Message
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:transmutation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":120},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a short piece of copper wire"}],"duration":{"t":"rounds","rounds":1},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"You point toward a creature within range and whisper a message. The target (and only the target) hears the message and can reply in a whisper that only you can hear. You can cast this spell through solid objects if you are familiar with the target and know it is beyond the barrier. Magical silence, 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 feet of wood blocks the spell. The spell doesn't have to follow a straight line and can travel freely around corners or through openings."}

spells.name: Minor Illusion
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:illusion","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":30},"components":[{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a bit of fleece"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1},"targets":["point"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:sorcerer","srd:warlock","srd:wizard"],"description":"You create a sound or an image of an object within range that lasts for the duration. See the Illusion description for the kinds of illusions you can create. The illusion ends if you cast this spell again or dismiss it (no action required). If you create a sound, its volume can range from a whisper to a scream. An image can be no larger than a 5-foot Cube. The image can't create sensory effects that a Light spell could. Physical interaction reveals it to be an illusion, and a creature using its action to examine the sound or image can identify it as illusory with a successful Investigation check against your spell save DC."}

spells.name: Poison Spray
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:necromancy","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":10},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:druid","srd:sorcerer","srd:warlock","srd:wizard"],"description":"You extend your hand toward a creature you can see within range and project a puff of noxious gas from your palm. The target must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 1d12 Poison damage.","cantripUpgrade":"The damage increases by 1d12 when you reach levels 5 (2d12), 11 (3d12), and 17 (4d12)."}

spells.name: Prestidigitation
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:transmutation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":10},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"hours","hours":1},"targets":["point"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:sorcerer","srd:warlock","srd:wizard"],"description":"This spell is a minor magical trick that novice spellcasters use for practice. You create one of the following magical effects within range: an instantaneous, harmless sensory effect (shower of sparks, puff of wind, faint odor, soft note); an instantaneous fire-starter effect (light or snuff a candle, torch, or small campfire); clean or soil a 1-foot cube; chill, warm, or flavor 1 cubic foot of nonliving material for 1 hour; make a color, a small mark, or a symbol appear on an object or surface for 1 hour; or create a nonmagical trinket or illusory image that fits in your hand and lasts until the end of your next turn."}

spells.name: Produce Flame
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:conjuration","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"self"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":10},"targets":["self"],"classListIds":["srd:druid"],"description":"A flickering flame appears in your hand. The flame remains there for the duration and harms neither you nor your equipment. The flame sheds Bright Light in a 10-foot radius and Dim Light for an additional 10 feet. The spell ends if you dismiss it (no action required) or if you cast it again. You can also attack with the flame: as a Magic action, hurl the flame at a creature or object within 60 feet. Make a ranged spell attack. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 Fire damage. This attack ends the spell.","cantripUpgrade":"The damage increases by 1d8 when you reach levels 5 (2d8), 11 (3d8), and 17 (4d8)."}

spells.name: Ray of Frost
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:evocation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":60},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"A frigid beam of blue-white light streaks toward a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 Cold damage, and its Speed is reduced by 10 feet until the start of your next turn.","cantripUpgrade":"The damage increases by 1d8 when you reach levels 5 (2d8), 11 (3d8), and 17 (4d8)."}

spells.name: Resistance
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:abjuration","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"touch"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a miniature cloak"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1,"concentration":true},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:cleric","srd:druid"],"description":"You touch one willing creature. Once before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to one saving throw of its choice. It can roll the die before or after making the saving throw. The spell then ends."}

spells.name: Sacred Flame
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:evocation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":60},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:cleric"],"description":"Flame-like radiance descends on a creature you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d8 Radiant damage. The target gains no benefit from Half Cover or Three-Quarters Cover for this save.","cantripUpgrade":"The damage increases by 1d8 when you reach levels 5 (2d8), 11 (3d8), and 17 (4d8)."}

spells.name: Shillelagh
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:transmutation","castingTime":{"t":"bonusAction"},"range":{"t":"touch"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"mistletoe, a shamrock leaf, and a Club or Quarterstaff"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1},"targets":["oneObject"],"classListIds":["srd:druid"],"description":"A Club or Quarterstaff you are holding is imbued with nature's power. For the duration, you can use your spellcasting ability instead of Strength for the attack and damage rolls of melee attacks using that weapon, and the weapon's damage die becomes a d8. The weapon also becomes magical if it isn't already. The spell ends if you cast it again or if you let go of the weapon."}

spells.name: Shocking Grasp
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:evocation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"touch"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"Lightning springs from your hand to deliver a shock to a creature you try to touch. Make a melee spell attack against the target. You have Advantage on the roll if the target is wearing armor made of metal. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 Lightning damage, and it can't take Reactions until the start of its next turn.","cantripUpgrade":"The damage increases by 1d8 when you reach levels 5 (2d8), 11 (3d8), and 17 (4d8)."}

spells.name: Spare the Dying
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:necromancy","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":15},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:cleric","srd:druid"],"description":"Choose a creature within range that has 0 Hit Points but isn't dead. The creature becomes Stable."}

spells.name: Starry Wisp
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:evocation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":60},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a bit of phosphorescent material"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:druid"],"description":"You launch a mote of light at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d8 Radiant damage and emits Dim Light in a 10-foot radius for 1 minute or until a creature takes a Magic action to extinguish the light. The target also has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the end of its next turn.","cantripUpgrade":"The damage increases by 1d8 when you reach levels 5 (2d8), 11 (3d8), and 17 (4d8)."}

spells.name: Thaumaturgy
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:transmutation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":30},"components":[{"t":"v"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1},"targets":["point"],"classListIds":["srd:cleric"],"description":"You manifest a minor wonder, a sign of supernatural power, within range. You create one of the following magical effects within range: your voice booms up to three times as loud as normal for 1 minute; cause flames to flicker, brighten, dim, or change color for 1 minute; cause harmless tremors in the ground for 1 minute; create an instantaneous sound that originates from a point of your choice within range; instantaneously cause an unlocked door or window to fly open or slam shut; or alter the appearance of your eyes for 1 minute. If you cast this spell multiple times, you can have up to three of its 1-minute effects active at a time, and you can dismiss such an effect as an action."}

spells.name: Thorn Whip
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:transmutation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":30},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"the stem of a plant with thorns"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:druid"],"description":"You create a long, vine-like whip covered in thorns that lashes out at a creature within range. Make a melee spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d6 Piercing damage, and if the target is Large or smaller, you pull the target up to 10 feet closer to you.","cantripUpgrade":"The damage increases by 1d6 when you reach levels 5 (2d6), 11 (3d6), and 17 (4d6)."}

spells.name: Toll the Dead
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:necromancy","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":60},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:cleric","srd:warlock","srd:wizard"],"description":"You point at one creature you can see within range, and the sound of a dolorous bell fills the air around it for a moment. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or take 1d8 Necrotic damage. If the target is missing any of its Hit Points, it instead takes 1d12 Necrotic damage.","cantripUpgrade":"The damage die changes when you reach levels 5 (2d8 or 2d12), 11 (3d8 or 3d12), and 17 (4d8 or 4d12)."}

spells.name: True Strike
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:divination","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"self"},"components":[{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a weapon with which the caster has proficiency and that is worth at least 1 SP"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["self"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:sorcerer","srd:warlock","srd:wizard"],"description":"Guided by a flash of magical insight, you make one attack with the weapon used in the spell's casting. The attack uses your spellcasting ability for the attack and damage rolls instead of using Strength or Dexterity. If the attack deals damage, it can be Radiant damage or the weapon's normal damage type (your choice).","cantripUpgrade":"The attack deals an extra 1d6 Radiant damage at levels 5 (+1d6), 11 (+2d6), and 17 (+3d6)."}

spells.name: Vicious Mockery
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:enchantment","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":60},"components":[{"t":"v"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:bard"],"description":"You unleash a string of insults laced with subtle enchantments at a creature you can see within range. If the target can hear you, it must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or take 1d6 Psychic damage and have Disadvantage on the next attack roll it makes before the end of its next turn.","cantripUpgrade":"The damage increases by 1d6 when you reach levels 5 (2d6), 11 (3d6), and 17 (4d6)."}

spells.name: Word of Radiance
spells.body: {"level":0,"schoolId":"srd:evocation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"self"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"m","description":"a holy symbol"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["aoeOriginPoint"],"area":{"t":"emanation","distanceFt":5},"classListIds":["srd:cleric"],"description":"You utter a divine word, and burning radiance erupts from you. Each creature of your choice that you can see within range must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or take 1d6 Radiant damage.","cantripUpgrade":"The damage increases by 1d6 when you reach levels 5 (2d6), 11 (3d6), and 17 (4d6)."}

spells.name: Alarm
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:abjuration","castingTime":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":30},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a tiny bell and a piece of fine silver wire"}],"duration":{"t":"hours","hours":8},"targets":["aoeOriginPoint"],"area":{"t":"cube","sideFt":20},"ritual":true,"classListIds":["srd:ranger","srd:wizard"],"description":"You set an alarm against intrusion. Choose a Cube up to 20 feet on a side. Until the spell ends, an alarm alerts you whenever a Tiny or larger creature touches or enters the area. When you cast the spell, you can designate creatures that won't set off the alarm. Choose either a mental or audible alarm. The mental alarm alerts you with a ping in your mind if you are within 1 mile of the area. The audible alarm produces a loud bell sound audible within 60 feet for 10 seconds."}

spells.name: Animal Friendship
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:enchantment","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":30},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a morsel of food"}],"duration":{"t":"hours","hours":24},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:druid","srd:ranger"],"description":"Target one Beast you can see within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the Charmed condition for the duration. The spell ends early if the target takes damage. This spell has no effect if the target's Intelligence is 4 or higher.","higherLevelSlot":"You can target one additional Beast for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Bane
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:enchantment","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":30},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a drop of blood"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1,"concentration":true},"targets":["multipleCreatures"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:cleric"],"description":"Up to three creatures of your choice within range must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be affected by this spell for the duration. Whenever an affected target makes an attack roll or a saving throw before the spell ends, the target must subtract 1d4 from the roll.","higherLevelSlot":"Target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Bless
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:enchantment","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":30},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a sprinkling of holy water"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1,"concentration":true},"targets":["multipleCreatures"],"classListIds":["srd:cleric","srd:paladin"],"description":"Choose up to three creatures within range. Whenever a target makes an attack roll or a saving throw before the spell ends, the target can roll a d4 and add the number rolled to the attack roll or save.","higherLevelSlot":"Target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Burning Hands
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:evocation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"self"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["aoeOriginPoint"],"area":{"t":"cone","lengthFt":15},"classListIds":["srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"Each creature in a 15-foot Cone originating from you makes a Dexterity saving throw, taking 3d6 Fire damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. Flammable objects in the Cone that aren't being worn or carried start burning.","higherLevelSlot":"The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Charm Person
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:enchantment","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":30},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"hours","hours":1},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:druid","srd:sorcerer","srd:warlock","srd:wizard"],"description":"One Humanoid you can see within range must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or have the Charmed condition for the duration or until you or your allies damage it. The target has Advantage on the save if you or your allies are fighting it. When the spell ends, the target knows it was Charmed.","higherLevelSlot":"Target one additional Humanoid for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Color Spray
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:illusion","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"self"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a pinch of powder or sand colored red, yellow, and blue"}],"duration":{"t":"rounds","rounds":1},"targets":["aoeOriginPoint"],"area":{"t":"cone","lengthFt":15},"classListIds":["srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"Roll 6d10; the total is how many Hit Points of creatures this spell can affect. Creatures in a 15-foot Cone originating from you are affected in ascending order of their current Hit Points (ignoring unconscious creatures). Starting with the creature with the lowest current Hit Points, each creature affected has the Blinded condition until the end of your next turn. Subtract each creature's Hit Points from the total before moving to the next; a creature's Hit Points must be equal to or less than the remaining total.","higherLevelSlot":"Roll an additional 2d10 for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Command
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:enchantment","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":60},"components":[{"t":"v"}],"duration":{"t":"rounds","rounds":1},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:cleric","srd:paladin"],"description":"Speak a one-word command to a creature within range. The target must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or follow the command on its next turn. The spell has no effect if the target is immune to the Charmed condition, doesn't understand your language, or if your command is directly harmful. Typical commands: Approach, Drop, Flee, Grovel, Halt.","higherLevelSlot":"Target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Comprehend Languages
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:divination","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"self"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a pinch of soot and salt"}],"duration":{"t":"hours","hours":1},"targets":["self"],"ritual":true,"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:sorcerer","srd:warlock","srd:wizard"],"description":"For the duration, you understand the literal meaning of any spoken or written language you hear or touch. It takes about 1 minute to read one page of text. This spell doesn't decode secret messages or glyphs."}

spells.name: Create or Destroy Water
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:transmutation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":30},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a drop of water if creating water or a few grains of sand if destroying it"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["aoeOriginPoint"],"area":{"t":"cube","sideFt":30},"classListIds":["srd:cleric","srd:druid"],"description":"Create or destroy water as follows. Create Water: Create up to 10 gallons of clean water within range in an open container, or as rain in a 30-foot Cube extinguishing exposed flames. Destroy Water: Destroy up to 10 gallons of water in an open container, or fog in a 30-foot Cube.","higherLevelSlot":"Add 10 gallons or cube size grows by 5 feet per spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Cure Wounds
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:abjuration","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"touch"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:cleric","srd:druid","srd:paladin","srd:ranger"],"description":"A creature you touch regains a number of Hit Points equal to 2d8 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on Undead or Constructs.","higherLevelSlot":"The healing increases by 2d8 for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Detect Evil and Good
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:divination","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"self"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":10,"concentration":true},"targets":["self"],"classListIds":["srd:cleric","srd:paladin"],"description":"For the duration, you know if there is an Aberration, Celestial, Elemental, Fey, Fiend, or Undead within 30 feet of yourself, as well as where the creature is located. Similarly, you know if there is a place or object within 30 feet of you that has been magically consecrated or desecrated. The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 feet of wood or dirt."}

spells.name: Detect Magic
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:divination","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"self"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":10,"concentration":true},"targets":["self"],"ritual":true,"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:cleric","srd:druid","srd:paladin","srd:ranger","srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"For the duration, you sense the presence of magical effects within 30 feet of yourself. If you sense such effects, you can take the Magic action to see a faint aura around any visible creature or object in the area that bears magic, and you learn its school of magic, if any. The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 feet of wood or dirt."}

spells.name: Detect Poison and Disease
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:divination","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"self"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a yew leaf"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":10,"concentration":true},"targets":["self"],"ritual":true,"classListIds":["srd:cleric","srd:druid","srd:paladin","srd:ranger"],"description":"For the duration, you sense the presence and location of poisons, poisonous creatures, and diseases within 30 feet of yourself. You also identify the kind of poison, poisonous creature, or disease in each case. The spell is blocked by 1 foot of stone, 1 inch of common metal, a thin sheet of lead, or 3 feet of wood or dirt."}

spells.name: Disguise Self
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:illusion","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"self"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"hours","hours":1},"targets":["self"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:sorcerer","srd:warlock","srd:wizard"],"description":"You make yourself—including your clothing, armor, weapons, and other belongings on your person—look different until the spell ends. You can seem 1 foot shorter or taller and appear thin, fat, or in between. The changes don't hold up to physical inspection; a creature can take a Study action to discern the illusion with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC."}

spells.name: Divine Favor
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:evocation","castingTime":{"t":"bonusAction"},"range":{"t":"self"},"components":[{"t":"v"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1,"concentration":true},"targets":["self"],"classListIds":["srd:paladin"],"description":"Your prayer empowers you with divine radiance. Until the spell ends, your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d4 Radiant damage on a hit."}

spells.name: Entangle
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:conjuration","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":90},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1,"concentration":true},"targets":["aoeOriginPoint"],"area":{"t":"cube","sideFt":20},"classListIds":["srd:druid","srd:ranger"],"description":"Grasping weeds and vines sprout from the ground in a 20-foot square within range. For the duration, these plants turn the ground in the area into Difficult Terrain. A creature in the area when you cast the spell must succeed on a Strength saving throw or have the Restrained condition until the spell ends. A Restrained creature can take an action to make a Strength (Athletics) check against your spell save DC; on a success, it frees itself."}

spells.name: Expeditious Retreat
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:transmutation","castingTime":{"t":"bonusAction"},"range":{"t":"self"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":10,"concentration":true},"targets":["self"],"classListIds":["srd:sorcerer","srd:warlock","srd:wizard"],"description":"This spell allows you to move at an incredible pace. When you cast this spell, and as a Bonus Action on each of your turns until the spell ends, you can take the Dash action."}

spells.name: Faerie Fire
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:evocation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":60},"components":[{"t":"v"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1,"concentration":true},"targets":["aoeOriginPoint"],"area":{"t":"cube","sideFt":20},"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:druid"],"description":"Each object in a 20-foot Cube within range is outlined in blue, green, or violet light (your choice). Any creature in the area when the spell is cast is also outlined in light if it fails a Dexterity saving throw. For the duration, outlined objects and creatures shed Dim Light in a 10-foot radius and can't benefit from the Invisible condition. Attack rolls against an affected creature or object have Advantage if the attacker can see it."}

spells.name: False Life
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:necromancy","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"self"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a small amount of alcohol or distilled spirits"}],"duration":{"t":"hours","hours":1},"targets":["self"],"classListIds":["srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"Bolstering yourself with a necromantic facsimile of life, you gain 1d4 + 4 Temporary Hit Points for the duration.","higherLevelSlot":"Temporary Hit Points increase by 5 for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Feather Fall
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:transmutation","castingTime":{"t":"reaction","trigger":"you or a creature within 60 feet falls"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":60},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"m","description":"a small feather or a piece of down"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1},"targets":["multipleCreatures"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"Choose up to five falling creatures within range. A falling creature's rate of descent slows to 60 feet per round until the spell ends. If the creature lands before the spell ends, it takes no damage from the fall and the spell ends for that creature."}

spells.name: Find Familiar
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:conjuration","castingTime":{"t":"hours","hours":1},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":10},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"10 gp worth of charcoal, incense, and herbs, which the spell consumes","costCp":1000,"consumed":true}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["point"],"ritual":true,"classListIds":["srd:wizard"],"description":"You gain the service of a familiar—a spirit that takes an animal Form you choose (Cat, Frog, Owl, Rat, Raven, Spider, etc.). The familiar has the statistics of the chosen Form but is a Celestial, Fey, or Fiend (your choice). You can telepathically communicate with it while within 100 feet, and as an action see through its senses. You can dismiss it temporarily to a pocket dimension or permanently."}

spells.name: Fog Cloud
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:conjuration","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":120},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"hours","hours":1,"concentration":true},"targets":["aoeOriginPoint"],"area":{"t":"sphere","radiusFt":20},"classListIds":["srd:druid","srd:ranger","srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"You create a 20-foot-radius Sphere of fog centered on a point within range. The Sphere is Heavily Obscured. It lasts for the duration or until a wind of moderate speed or greater disperses it.","higherLevelSlot":"Radius increases by 20 feet per spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Goodberry
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:conjuration","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"self"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a sprig of mistletoe"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["self"],"classListIds":["srd:druid","srd:ranger"],"description":"Up to ten berries appear in your hand and are infused with magic for the duration. A creature can take a Bonus Action to eat one berry, which restores 1 Hit Point and provides enough nourishment to sustain a creature for one day. The berries lose their potency if they have not been consumed within 24 hours of the casting of this spell."}

spells.name: Grease
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:conjuration","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":60},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a bit of pork rind or butter"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1},"targets":["aoeOriginPoint"],"area":{"t":"cube","sideFt":10},"classListIds":["srd:wizard"],"description":"Slick grease covers the ground in a 10-foot square centered on a point within range and turns it into Difficult Terrain for the duration. When the grease appears, each creature in the area must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or fall Prone. A creature that enters the area or ends its turn there must also succeed on a Dexterity save or fall Prone."}

spells.name: Guiding Bolt
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:evocation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":120},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"rounds","rounds":1},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:cleric"],"description":"A flash of light streaks toward a creature of your choice within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 4d6 Radiant damage, and the next attack roll made against it before the end of your next turn has Advantage, thanks to the mystical dim light glittering on the target.","higherLevelSlot":"The damage increases by 1d6 for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Healing Word
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:abjuration","castingTime":{"t":"bonusAction"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":60},"components":[{"t":"v"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:cleric","srd:druid"],"description":"A creature of your choice that you can see within range regains Hit Points equal to 2d4 plus your spellcasting ability modifier. This spell has no effect on Undead or Constructs.","higherLevelSlot":"The healing increases by 2d4 for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Hellish Rebuke
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:evocation","castingTime":{"t":"reaction","trigger":"you are damaged by a creature within 60 feet that you can see"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":60},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:warlock"],"description":"You point your finger, and the creature that damaged you is momentarily surrounded by hellish flames. The creature must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 2d10 Fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.","higherLevelSlot":"The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Heroism
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:enchantment","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"touch"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1,"concentration":true},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:paladin"],"description":"A willing creature you touch is imbued with bravery. Until the spell ends, the creature is immune to the Frightened condition and gains Temporary Hit Points equal to your spellcasting ability modifier at the start of each of its turns. When the spell ends, the target loses any remaining Temporary Hit Points from this spell.","higherLevelSlot":"Target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Hunter's Mark
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:divination","castingTime":{"t":"bonusAction"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":90},"components":[{"t":"v"}],"duration":{"t":"hours","hours":1,"concentration":true},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:ranger"],"description":"You magically mark one creature you can see within range as your quarry. Until the spell ends, you deal an extra 1d6 damage to the target whenever you hit it with an attack roll, and you have Advantage on any Wisdom (Perception) and Wisdom (Survival) checks to find it. If the target drops to 0 Hit Points before the spell ends, you can take a Bonus Action on a later turn to mark a new creature.","higherLevelSlot":"The damage becomes 1d6 (slots 1-2), 2d6 (slots 3-4), or 3d6 (slot 5+)."}

spells.name: Identify
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:divination","castingTime":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1},"range":{"t":"touch"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a pearl worth 100+ GP and an owl feather","costCp":10000}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneObject","oneCreature"],"ritual":true,"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:wizard"],"description":"You choose one object or creature that you can see throughout the casting. If it is a magic item or some other magic-imbued object, you learn its properties and how to use them, whether it requires Attunement, and how many charges it has, if any. You learn whether any spells are affecting the item and what they are. If the item was created by a spell, you learn which spell created it. If you instead touch a creature throughout the casting, you learn what spells, if any, are currently affecting it."}

spells.name: Inflict Wounds
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:necromancy","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"touch"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:cleric"],"description":"Make a melee spell attack against a creature you can reach. On a hit, the target takes 2d10 Necrotic damage.","higherLevelSlot":"The damage increases by 2d10 for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Jump
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:transmutation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"touch"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a grasshopper's hind leg"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:druid","srd:ranger","srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"One willing creature you touch has its Long Jump and High Jump distances tripled until the spell ends."}

spells.name: Longstrider
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:transmutation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"touch"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a pinch of dirt"}],"duration":{"t":"hours","hours":1},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:bard","srd:druid","srd:ranger","srd:wizard"],"description":"You touch a creature. The target's Speed increases by 10 feet until the spell ends.","higherLevelSlot":"Target one additional creature for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Mage Armor
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:abjuration","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"touch"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a piece of cured leather"}],"duration":{"t":"hours","hours":8},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"A willing creature you touch who isn't wearing armor is sheathed in protective magical force. The target's base AC becomes 13 plus its Dexterity modifier. The spell ends if the target dons armor or you dismiss the spell (no action required)."}

spells.name: Magic Missile
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:evocation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":120},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["multipleCreatures"],"classListIds":["srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"You create three glowing darts of magical Force. Each dart hits a creature of your choice that you can see within range. A dart deals 1d4 + 1 Force damage. The darts all strike simultaneously, and you can direct them to hit one creature or several.","higherLevelSlot":"The spell creates one more dart for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Protection from Evil and Good
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:abjuration","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"touch"},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"holy water or powdered silver and iron, which the spell consumes","consumed":true}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":10,"concentration":true},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:cleric","srd:paladin","srd:warlock","srd:wizard"],"description":"Until the spell ends, one willing creature you touch is protected against Aberrations, Celestials, Elementals, Fey, Fiends, and Undead. The protection grants several benefits: creatures of those types have Disadvantage on attack rolls against the target, the target can't be Charmed, Frightened, or possessed by them, and if the target is already affected by those conditions from such a creature, it has Advantage on any new saving throw against the effect."}

spells.name: Purify Food and Drink
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:transmutation","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":10},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["aoeOriginPoint"],"area":{"t":"sphere","radiusFt":5},"ritual":true,"classListIds":["srd:cleric","srd:druid","srd:paladin"],"description":"All nonmagical food and drink within a 5-foot-radius Sphere centered on a point of your choice within range is purified and rendered free of poison and disease."}

spells.name: Ray of Sickness
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:necromancy","castingTime":{"t":"action"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":60},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"}],"duration":{"t":"instantaneous"},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:sorcerer","srd:wizard"],"description":"A ray of sickening greenish energy lashes out toward a creature within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 2d8 Poison damage and must succeed on a Constitution saving throw or have the Poisoned condition until the end of your next turn.","higherLevelSlot":"The damage increases by 1d8 for each spell slot level above 1."}

spells.name: Sanctuary
spells.body: {"level":1,"schoolId":"srd:abjuration","castingTime":{"t":"bonusAction"},"range":{"t":"feet","feet":30},"components":[{"t":"v"},{"t":"s"},{"t":"m","description":"a small silver mirror"}],"duration":{"t":"minutes","minutes":1},"targets":["oneCreature"],"classListIds":["srd:cleric"],"description":"You ward a creature within range against attack. Until the spell ends, any creature who targets the warded creature with an attack or a harmful spell must first make a Wisdom saving throw. On a failed save, the creature must choose a new target or lose the attack or spell. The spell doesn't protect the warded creature from area effects. If the warded creature makes an attack, casts a spell that affects an enemy, or deals damage, the spell ends."}

spells.name: Shield

A creature that takes the Study action to examine the image can determine it is an illusion with a successful Intelligence (Investigation) check against your spell save DC."}
